module_info.docstring:
Automated scorer for tldrs context packs.

Evaluates context quality by:
1. Reading the stdout artifact from an interbench run
2. Analyzing it with Claude Code CLI (no API key needed)
3. Scoring on multiple dimensions
4. Piping scores back into interbench

Usage:
    # Score a single run
    ./scripts/score_context.py <RUN_ID>

    # Score and show reasoning
    ./scripts/score_context.py <RUN_ID> --verbose

    # Dry run (show scores but don't insert)
    ./scripts/score_context.py <RUN_ID> --dry-run

Environment:
    INTERBENCH_HOME - interbench data directory (default: ~/.interbench)
